query: SELECT difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal' GROUP BY difficulty ORDER BY FIELD(difficulty, 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2mhhtxpXA9Esras.root --database etVPnUidWNWG8W4GHnRqzv --execute SELECT difficulty, COUNT(*) as count FROM quickfireQuestions WHERE echoCategory = 'fetal' GROUP BY difficulty ORDER BY FIELD(difficulty, 'beginner', 'intermediate', 'advanced');
